title: glycyrrhiza aspera subsp. iconica
intro: Glycyrrhiza aspera subsp. iconica, also known as Chinese licorice or Mongolian licorice, is a subspecies of the Glycyrrhiza aspera plant, a perennial legume native to China and Mongolia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which contribute to its numerous health benefits. The health benefits of Glycyrrhiza aspera subsp. iconica include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, it is used in herbal preparations such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
